seo.description: Free summer festival in Itterbeek. Three days of music, cold beer and good company on the field next to the Sint-Anna-Pedekerk. Last weekend of July.

cookies.title: Cookies, keeping it simple
cookies.text:
We use cookies for functional and analytical purposes only. No personal data, no ads.

More in our privacy policy.

notFound.title: Nothing to see here
notFound.message: This page doesn't exist, or doesn't anymore. Head back to home, or tell us what you were looking for.

error.title: Something went sideways
error.message: Our servers are coughing a bit. Try again or head back to the homepage. If it keeps happening, drop us a line.
